content.problemStatement:
Chef has an array AAA such that Ai=iA_i = iAi‚Äč=i.

A transform on the array is performed by replacing each element of the array with the bitwise XOR of the prefix till that element. For example, if BBB denotes the array after performing transform on array AAA, then, Bi=A1‚äēA2‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēAiB_i = A_1 \oplus A_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus A_iBi‚Äč=A1‚Äč‚äēA2‚Äč‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēAi‚Äč. Similarly, if CCC denotes the array after performing two transforms on array AAA, then, Ci=B1‚äēB2‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēBiC_i = B_1 \oplus B_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus B_iCi‚Äč=B1‚Äč‚äēB2‚Äč‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēBi‚Äč.

Let fKf^KfK be the array obtained by performing KKK transforms on the array AAA. Thus, fXKf^K_XfXK‚Äč denotes the XthX^{th}Xth element of the KthK^{th}Kth transform of the array AAA.

Formally,


fi0=Aif^0_i = A_ifi0‚Äč=Ai‚Äč
fi1=A1‚äēA2‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēAif^1_i = A_1 \oplus A_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus A_ifi1‚Äč=A1‚Äč‚äēA2‚Äč‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēAi‚Äč
fi2=f11‚äēf21‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēfi1f^2_i = f^1_1 \oplus f^1_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus f^1_ifi2‚Äč=f11‚Äč‚äēf21‚Äč‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēfi1‚Äč
fik=f1k‚ąí1‚äēf2k‚ąí1‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēfik‚ąí1f^k_i = f^{k-1}_1 \oplus f^{k-1}_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus f^{k-1}_ifik‚Äč=f1k‚ąí1‚Äč‚äēf2k‚ąí1‚Äč‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēfik‚ąí1‚Äč. Here, ‚äē\oplus‚äē denotes the bitwise XOR operation.
Given KKK and XXX, determine the value fXKf^K_XfXK‚Äč.


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
Each test case contains of a single line of input, two integers K,XK, XK,X as mentioned in the problem statement.


Output Format
For each test case, output in a single line, the value fXKf^K_XfXK‚Äč
